docs.text: Welcome to MkDocs For full documentation visit mkdocs.org . Commands mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project. mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server. mkdocs build - Build the documentation site. mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit. Project layout mkdocs.yml # The configuration file. 🏠 首页: index.md 💻 技术笔记: 在 Mac 上配置 Python: tech/python-mac.md MkDocs 部署指南: tech/mkdocs-tips.md 📚 学业/课程: 心理学视频项目: academic/psychology.md 英语学习记录: academic/cet4-vocab.md 🏸 兴趣爱好: 羽毛球进阶: life/badminton.md 👤 关于我: about.md
